scripts.db:clean: wrangler d1 execute happenings-db --local --command 'DELETE FROM events'
scripts.db:count: wrangler d1 execute happenings-db --local --command 'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM events'
scripts.db:list: wrangler d1 execute happenings-db --local --command 'SELECT * FROM events ORDER BY start_time'
scripts.db:remote:clean: wrangler d1 execute happenings-db --remote --command 'DELETE FROM events'
scripts.db:remote:count: wrangler d1 execute happenings-db --remote --command 'SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM events'
scripts.db:remote:list: wrangler d1 execute happenings-db --remote --command 'SELECT * FROM events ORDER BY start_time'
scripts.db:remote:delete: wrangler d1 execute happenings-db --remote --command "DELETE FROM events WHERE id='$EVENT_ID'"
